Lore Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Voice Graft (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 4.0) at Level 49
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: SHD DRU BRD SHM NEC MAG ENC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Confirmed still dropping
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2008 at 9:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760442569
Scholar
24 posts
Am camping for an Anklesmasher and got this to drop just today, 1-27-08. So I can confirm they are still dropping.

Was on only the second spawn of the Grand Lorekeeper for me, but after 9 hours of camping this. I've seen the other named quite a bit more frequently.
▲ Page top
yay
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2007 at 9:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1697415410975
Scholar
204 posts
found a pair today after a Royals raid. i joined late, but after the raid was over, noticed the Lorekeeper was up on tracking. went down, kited the room to kill off adds and then meleed him down. dispell him a bunch of times first so he loses his damn SoW, and keep him snared. he's pretty easy. dropped the book and the pants on the first spawn, and then the next time the room popped, he spawned again. dropped the chords and the book. woot

a way to get around the chords not working with familiars is to charm something else, click your chords to get the effect, and then pull out your familiar or what have you.

Edited, Nov 5th 2007 12:13am by xlitin

▲ Page top
Could a 65 BST get this solo?
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2005 at 3:10 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591751738458
87 posts
No one ever does Chardok on my server anymore I have a set of stalking probes to open the door, but I'm wondering if I could do the room solo. I'm non KOS to the Brood of Di'Zok, but still scowling to the Sarnak Collective. Would I have any trouble? Corpse recovery here I'm sure is hell.
▲ Page top
RE: Could a 65 BST get this solo?
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2005 at 9:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1705882585245
Scholar
171 posts
I camp the lower floor of the library on my server with a bst and a clr, and i have a ally rogue to open the door for me, so I can get in...both bst and clr are time geared with some GoD armors.

you gotta have snare cause these mobs run at low health and if one gets away you're wasted. It's pretty easy to fight down until you get to the bridge leading into the library, there are 3 heavy hitters, 2 ancient golem types and 1 crystal golem type, and 2 sarnark royal elite guards or something there. after you get past those you'll have about 12 more sarnaks to kill and of those 12 you'll get 6+ at once, trying to get down the stairs towards the first locked door.

facing the locked door standing even with the right edge of the door you'll be safe and wont get any aggro. You can camp on either side of the locked door (important note there) this was with level 70 chars.

Now I said all that to say this. if you can get a rogue to pick the door for you, you can safely med right by the door and you wont get any aggro. then you can invis and run past the 6 defenders, make the left turn, and there'll be 2 sarnaks facing you, chances are 1 or both will see invis, your best bet is to charge them and make a sharp right and fight them in that corner, if you dont have hobble your doomed. there is 1 roamer on the top floor. Clearing the top floor is easy. its the bottom floor thats a pain, it has 2 roamers, and when you pull 1 mob you'll pull a minimum of 4 sarnaks. If you can some how strategize a way to keep you and the pet up, during this nasty *** pulls your golden. once you get the camp broke you can very easily solo this camp...but breaking in solo with a beastlord you'll find it to be quite a challenge.

Edited, Fri Feb 25 21:34:57 2005
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 05 2004 at 10:56 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I mean i want this more then anyone that has pets and can use plus a Tiger talking would just be the **** lol.. :D so but why so spendy I heard a lv 65 Enchanter could solo it (and no flammage here but the person that told me that means justa bout anyone could do it.) So lets hear it... why?

__DEL__1592251556481
2 posts
Confirmed they still drop as of 01/29/2004. Its possible to solo as a chanter, but expect to get 5-6 adds at the same time. Killed PH once, Grand Shai-din spawned and he had the cords. Supposed to be ultra rare, so I guess I had some luck.
